target.title: fix(docs): make README sponsors visible on dark backgrounds
target.body:
fix(docs): make README sponsors visible on dark backgrounds

## Summary

- Replace theme-dependent sponsor logos in the README with stable light-background sponsor tiles.
- Add README sponsor tile SVGs so sponsor names remain visible in GitHub dark mode, light mode, and local Markdown previews.
- Keep each sponsor linked individually.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `xmllint --noout docs/assets/sponsors/*-tile.svg`
- `npx -y -p node@22.19.0 -p pnpm@11.2.2 pnpm docs:list`
- Previewed the sponsor tiles on a dark background.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: README sponsor logos can disappear against dark Markdown backgrounds.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: rendered the new sponsor tile SVGs and previewed them on a dark background.
Evidence after fix: all six sponsor tiles render with light backgrounds and dark readable names.
Observed result after fix: OpenAI, GitHub, NVIDIA, Vercel, Blacksmith, and Convex are visible on dark backgrounds.
What was not tested: GitHub web UI rendering after merge.
target.author: siyuansdsd
